login.hintSignIn: Sign in with your User ID and password.
login.hintRegister: Create an account with a secure password (8+ characters).
login.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
login.errorRegisterFailed: Registration failed. Tenant may not exist or email already registered.

consent.title: Recording consent
consent.recordingConsent: I consent to recording and analyzing my recitation. (Required to record.)
consent.teacherReview: Keep my recitation for teacher review (otherwise it is discarded after analysis).
consent.anonymizedLearning: Help improve the model with anonymized data.
consent.externalAsrProcessing: Allow browser or cloud speech processing if the local Quran ASR is unavailable.
consent.guardianApproved: A parent/guardian approves this (required for learners under 13).

progress.title: Progress
progress.chartEmpty: Recite once to see your accuracy here.

learnerHome.onboardingStepListen: Listen to a teacher-paced recitation of the passage.
learnerHome.onboardingStepRecite: Recite it yourself with the words visible for guidance.
learnerHome.onboardingStepMemory: Try again from memory to test what stuck.
learnerHome.onboardingStepCorrect: Review only the words that need a little more care.
learnerHome.masteryEmptyBody: Recite once to see your accuracy, mastery, and streak grow here.
learnerHome.missionHeading: Strengthen {{surah}} with a calm mastery loop.
learnerHome.missionBody: Listen once, recite with guidance, try from memory, then repeat only the words that need attention.

correction.label: Correction
correction.helper: Review only the words that need care.

drill.label: Drill
drill.helper: Repeat the short phrase three times.

practiceFlow.analyzing: Analyzing your recitation with Whisper ASR...
practiceFlow.consentPromptTitle: One quick step before recording — please confirm consent:

micNotice.idle: Microphone is optional until guided recite.
micNotice.ready: Microphone is ready for guided recite.
micNotice.denied: Microphone denied. Practice still works in listen and teacher-review mode.

modeBanner.deniedText: Microphone access is denied. You can still listen and practice, then ask a teacher to review in class.
modeBanner.unavailableText: Microphone capture is unavailable on this device. Continue with listen mode or teacher review.
modeBanner.correctionText_one: Low-confidence guidance: {{count}} word needs a gentle review before feedback is shown as final.
modeBanner.correctionText_other: Low-confidence guidance: {{count}} words need a gentle review before feedback is shown as final.
modeBanner.correctionTextNoMistakes: No flagged words in this pass — review is optional before feedback is shown as final.
modeBanner.drillTextSent: Sent to your teacher for review. For now, repeat the short phrase slowly three times.
modeBanner.drillTextSendFailed: Couldn't reach the server to send this to your teacher — try again from the previous step. Meanwhile, repeat the short phrase slowly three times.
modeBanner.drillTextNothingToSend: No analyzed recitation to send yet — record one first. Meanwhile, repeat the short phrase slowly three times.
modeBanner.drillTextLocal: Drill practice. Repeat the short phrase slowly three times.
modeBanner.defaultText: Learner view keeps model and gateway details hidden. Focus on the verse, pacing, and review.

completePanel.title: Practice complete
completePanel.bodySaved: Progress saved. Your next review stays scheduled for {{nextReview}}.
completePanel.bodyNothingRecited: You reached the end of the loop. Record a recitation next time to save progress toward mastery.
completePanel.bodySaveFailed: Couldn't save your progress just now — check your connection and try another recitation. Your practice still counts once it saves.

offlineBanner.text: You're offline. Some features may be unavailable until connectivity is restored.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: An unexpected error occurred. Your progress is safe — try refreshing or click the button below to recover.

audioCoach.hintRecording: Recite clearly — tap stop when you're done.
audioCoach.hintReady: Play it back, or record again.
audioCoach.hintReadyToRecite: Tap the mic to record — or hear the reference first.

tajweedPanel.title: Tajweed
tajweedPanel.empty: Recite to get tajweed feedback (makhraj, madd, ghunnah).
tajweedPanel.aiSuggestionTitle: This is an AI suggestion and has not yet been reviewed by a teacher.

mutashabihatPanel.title: Mutashabihat
mutashabihatPanel.empty: Similar-verse guidance for this passage is coming soon.

internalSurface.placeholderBody: Internal review tools stay out of the learner path. Use Internal Command for the full platform console.

liveAlignment.noStoredAlignments: No stored word alignments for the latest session yet.

scholarReview.title: Trust ledger
scholarReview.empty: No scholar approvals in the ledger yet.

benchmark.title: Release benchmarks
benchmark.empty: No eval run published for the current model.

governance.title: Religious safety controls
governance.sourceLine: Source coverage: {{coverage}} · canonical Quran text never machine-modified.

errors.platformApiUnreachable: Could not reach the platform API. Please try again.
errors.mlAnalysisUnavailable: ML analysis unavailable. Make sure the platform API and ML service are running.
errors.asrConsentRequired: Recording saved in this browser. Enable ASR processing consent to run automatic analysis.
errors.recitationSavedOffline: Saved your recitation — you can play it back. Analysis is offline right now.
errors.noClearSpeech: We couldn't hear clear speech. Your recording is saved — try reciting a little louder.
errors.processingFailed: Could not process the recording. Please try again.
errors.consentRequiredBeforeRecording: Please consent to recording and analysis in the consent panel before recording your recitation.
errors.recitationAudioLoadFailed: Could not load recitation audio. Check your connection.
errors.audioPlaybackBlocked: Audio was blocked — tap play again to allow playback.
